metadata.title: Debug Experiment Configs + Shell Wrapper + Flow Chaining
metadata.depends-on: feat/hydra-bridge must be merged into main first
metadata.pr-title: feat(debug): Hydra experiment configs + run_debug.sh + flow chaining

child-plan.setup:
git checkout main && git pull origin main git checkout -b feat/debug-configs
Read: CLAUDE.md Read: configs/README.md Read: src/minivess/config/CLAUDE.md Read: deployment/CLAUDE.md Read: docs/planning/script-consolidation.xml (Phases 2-5) Read: configs/base.yaml Read: configs/experiment/ (list existing configs for format reference)

phase.name: Create Debug Experiment Configs

task.name: Create 5 debug experiment YAMLs

tests.test: test_debug_single_model_compose — compose_experiment_config("debug_single_model") succeeds and returns dict with max_epochs=1, debug=true
test_debug_all_models_compose — verify models_to_test list has 5 entries
test_debug_multi_loss_compose — verify losses list has 3 entries
test_all_debug_configs_have_debug_flag — all debug_* configs set debug=true

task.implementation: Create each YAML using '@package _global_' header and lightweight checkpoint defaults. See script-consolidation.xml design section for exact contents. Each file is a standard Hydra experiment YAML — same format as existing configs.

task.name: Create lightweight checkpoint config
task.implementation: Minimal checkpoint config for debug runs: - save_top_k: 1 - monitor: val_loss (simpler than full metrics) - patience: 999 (no early stopping in debug)

phase.commit:
git commit -m "feat(config): 5 debug experiment YAMLs + lightweight checkpoint
Phase 2 of script-consolidation plan: - debug_single_model: 1 model, 1 fold, 1 epoch (~2 min) - debug_all_models: 5 models, 3 folds, 2 epochs (~30 min) - debug_full_pipeline: train + post-training + analysis (~15 min) - debug_multi_loss: 3 losses for ensemble testing (~15 min) - debug_data_validation: MONAI dataloader check - lightweight checkpoint config for fast iteration
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

phase.name: Shell Wrapper and Preflight

task.name: Create run_debug.sh
task.implementation:
Shell wrapper that: 1. Preflight: Docker daemon, NVIDIA runtime, minivess-base image, minivess-network, data accessible, HF_TOKEN (if SAM3) 2. Read models_to_test from experiment YAML via Python one-liner: python3 -c "import yaml; print(' '.join(yaml.safe_load(open('configs/experiment/$EXPERIMENT.yaml')) .get('models_to_test', [yaml.safe_load(open('configs/experiment/$EXPERIMENT.yaml')).get('model','dynunet')])))" 3. For each model: docker compose -f deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml run --rm \ -e EXPERIMENT=$experiment \ -e HYDRA_OVERRIDES="model=$model,$user_overrides" \ train 2>&1 | tee outputs/debug/logs/$model.log 4. If flows includes post_training or analyze: chain them 5. Validate MLflow runs, print summary
CLI: --experiment NAME --override KEY=VALUE [--dry-run]

task.name: Justfile integration
task.implementation: Add recipes: just debug # debug_single_model just debug-all-models # debug_all_models just debug-pipeline # debug_full_pipeline just debug EXPERIMENT OVERRIDES # custom

phase.commit:
git commit -m "feat(debug): run_debug.sh wrapper + justfile integration
Phase 3 of script-consolidation plan: - run_debug.sh: preflight, model iteration, Docker compose, log capture - Justfile recipes: just debug, just debug-all-models, just debug-pipeline
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

phase.name: Multi-Flow Chaining

task.name: Flow chaining in run_debug.sh
task.implementation: Read 'flows' list from experiment YAML. After training completes: - If 'post_training' in flows: docker compose run post_training with -e UPSTREAM_EXPERIMENT=$experiment_name - If 'analyze' in flows: docker compose run analyze with -e UPSTREAM_EXPERIMENT=$experiment_name Chain sequentially. Capture per-flow status.

task.name: Pipeline summary report
task.implementation: After all flows complete, print summary table and save JSON: - Per-flow: status, duration, MLflow run count - Per-model: timing, error context - Total duration, experiment name for MLflow lookup - Save to outputs/debug/summary_{timestamp}.json

phase.commit:
git commit -m "feat(debug): multi-flow chaining + pipeline summary report
Phase 4 of script-consolidation plan: - run_debug.sh chains train → post_training → analyze when flows list defined - Pipeline summary JSON saved to outputs/debug/
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

phase.name: Documentation

task.name: Update configs/README.md with debug section
task.implementation: Add debug experiment config documentation with usage examples. Already partially done — verify and expand.

phase.commit:
git commit -m "docs: update configs/README.md with debug experiment docs
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

child-plan.finalize:
uv run pytest tests/ -x -q uv run ruff check src/ tests/ uv run mypy src/
git push -u origin feat/debug-configs gh pr create --title "feat(debug): Hydra experiment configs + run_debug.sh + flow chaining" \ --body "## Summary - 5 debug experiment YAMLs (standard Hydra format, same directory as all other experiments) - run_debug.sh: preflight, multi-model iteration, Docker compose, log capture - Multi-flow chaining: train → post_training → analyze - Pipeline summary report (JSON) - Justfile integration: just debug, just debug-all-models, just debug-pipeline
## Plan Implements Phases 2-5 of docs/planning/script-consolidation.xml
## Test plan - [ ] compose_experiment_config() resolves all 5 debug configs - [ ] run_debug.sh --dry-run shows correct Docker compose commands - [ ] Pipeline summary JSON generated after multi-flow run
Generated with Claude Code"
